mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.prompt_id, b.created_at, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.bookmark_count, p.like_count FROM bookmarks b LEFT JOIN prompts p ON p.id = b.prompt_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId}::uuid ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookmarks WHERE user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookmarks (id, user_id, prompt_id) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), #{userId}::uuid, #{promptId}::uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bookmarks WHERE user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid
